during the cold war the united states was led by several presidents including truman kennedy nixon and reagan while the soviet union was led by leaders such as stalin khrushchev brezhnev and andropov the cold war was a period of intense political and military rivalry between these two superpowers with neither side engaging in direct warfare but instead competing through proxy conflicts espionage and ideological battles the leadership of these nations played a crucial role in shaping the events of this era the us and soviet union were the two dominant forces in global affairs during this time with their actions influencing the rest of the world
